content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Implemented the remaining prompt-contract remediation for bead `ralph-burning-9ni.6.1`. I updated `src/contexts/project_run_record/service.rs` so bead description parsing now captures embedded acceptance-criteria items instead of dropping them from `Must-Do Scope`, then merges those description-sourced items into the canonical `Acceptance Criteria` section when the structured bead field is empty. I also tightened section parsing so `Non-goals:` and embedded `Acceptance Criteria` blocks end when a new top-level subsection begins after a blank line, which keeps follow-on required prose such as `Contract hardening notes:` in `Must-Do Scope` instead of misclassifying it as an explicit non-goal. Deterministic unit and CLI regressions were added to cover both fixes end to end.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspect the bead prompt renderer, create-from-bead context path, and existing regressions to confirm why description-only acceptance criteria were being dropped and why later subsections after `Non-goals:` were leaking into explicit non-goals.
2. [Completed] Patch bead-description scope parsing to collect embedded acceptance criteria, merge them into canonical prompt acceptance criteria when needed, and reset non-goal/acceptance section capture when a new top-level subsection starts after a blank line.
3. [Completed] Add deterministic unit and CLI regression tests for description-only acceptance criteria preservation and for keeping `Contract hardening notes:` in `Must-Do Scope`, then run focused formatting and cargo tests.

## Validation Evidence

- Ran `TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp cargo fmt --all` successfully.
- Ran `TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp cargo test render_bead_task_prompt -- --nocapture` successfully, including the new description-acceptance and post-non-goal subsection regressions.
- Ran `TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp cargo test create_project_from_bead_context -- --nocapture` successfully, including the new description-only acceptance bootstrap regression.
- Ran `TMPDIR=$PWD/.tmp cargo test project_create_from_bead_preserves_description_only_acceptance_criteria_and_hardening_notes -- --nocapture` successfully to verify the CLI `create-from-bead` path preserves description-only acceptance criteria and keeps `Contract hardening notes:` in `Must-Do Scope`.

## Outstanding Risks

- The bead-description parser still recognizes only explicit `Non-goals` and `Acceptance Criteria` section markers plus blank-line-delimited subsection boundaries; materially different prose layouts may still remain in `Must-Do Scope` until the parser is extended.
- I ran focused formatting and targeted regression coverage for the amended prompt-contract paths, not the full repository test suite.
- The workspace still contains the pre-existing untracked `.ralph-burning/` directory, which I left untouched.
